_comment: Style philosophy for a PRODUCT DEMO / tool walkthrough (e.g. the Stacks OS demo). The screen is the star, so the face/zoom theatrics step back and the explainer graphics step forward: steps + value cards over flashy reveals, almost no emphasis captions (the UI carries it), gentle SFX, warm-neutral grade, focused music. Inherits the global brand kit; only BIASES selection.
name: demo
